title: styrax japonicus var. kotoensis
intro: Styrax japonicus var. kotoensis, also known as Japanese storax or Koto storax, is a variety of the Styrax japonicus tree, native to East Asia and known for its fragrant bark and resin. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Styrax japonicus var. kotoensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and promoting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the resin and bark are often used to create salves, ointments, and teas that can be applied topically or ingested to harness its therapeutic properties.
